zh.lifeSummary: 當Janet DeMortimer於大約1173年之前出生在英國賀福爾維格莫時，她的父親Bartholomew de Mortimer28歲，母親Lucia de Clifford35歲。她於1185年之前與Robert DeMorley結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1240年之後。

nameMeanings.name: Janet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

variants.name: Jannet
meanings: Originally a diminutive of   Jane  , already in common use in the Middle English period. It remained in use in Scotland and in some parts of England well into the 17th century and was revived at the end of the 19th century to much more widespread use, while still retaining its popularity in Scotland. Since the 1960s, however, it has rather gone out of fashion in Britain.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Janet DeMortimer was born before about 1173, in Wigmore, Herefordshire, England, her father, Bartholomew de Mortimer, was 28 and her mother, Lucia de Clifford, was 35. She married Robert DeMorley before 1185. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died after 1240.

ko.lifeSummary: Janet DeMortimer(이)가 대략 1173년 이전 영국 허퍼드실르 위그모어에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de Mortimer(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lucia de Clifford(은)는 35세였다. 그녀는 1185년 이전 Robert DeMorley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1240년 이후 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Janet DeMortimer родилась перед около 1173 г. в местности вигмор, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de Mortimer было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Lucia de Clifford, 35. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert DeMorley перед 1185 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла после 1240 г.
